assessor_1_raw: Heart failure readmission prediction: methodologically sound with temporal split, IHF cohort definition, and comprehensive clinical features. ROC-AUC appropriate for risk triage. Decision curve analysis and calibration are important clinical metrics. Measurement frequency confound check is critical. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Well-designed clinical prediction study. GRU/transformer for irregular EHR time series is appropriate. Planned readmission exclusion is thorough. Site-stratified AUC enables confound detection. L2-regularized logistic regression is a well-motivated baseline. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Strong heart failure readmission design. The discharge disposition feature is correctly framed as available at the prediction time (discharge). Hosmer-Lemeshow + calibration curve is a comprehensive calibration assessment. Scope bounded to same institution. No fundamental methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: All three assessors unanimous: defense_wins across all three runs.
